sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80488" key="pellaixno/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πελλαιχνόν· </orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυρρόν</foreign>, Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Πελλάνιος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, epith. of Poseidon at Cyrene, Id.</entryFree>
